response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with real-time systems experience (Dunnhumby) and event-driven architecture (GISCollective). His recent work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) aligns with the role’s requirements, though his agentic-AI production experience appears limited compared to the role’s demands. His fintech experience is minimal, and his leadership track record is unclear beyond team contributions.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and real-time backend expertise (Dunnhumby, GISCollective)
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent frameworks and developer tooling (re:cinq)
Proven ability to scale systems and contribute to open-source projects
concerns: Limited direct fintech or regulated-environment experience
No clear track record of leading 10+ person engineering teams to 30+
Agentic-AI production experience appears recent and may lack depth for CTO-level expectations
